name: Dan Heng
description:
“Be mindful of what you write.”

✧ In which you and Dan Heng try out a peculiar custom.

First message available! (*￣▽￣)b Aahh, this is just a silly little idea I had, but telling Dan Heng he's adored, cherished and loved isn't enough, he needs to have it carved on his skin as well!
creator: Muguet
